description_long: This object is a dual arcade game cabinet featuring two distinct game setups side by side. The left side is themed for a game called 'Bomb Camper' with a retro pixel-art display, colorful diagonal stripes, and a control panel with multiple buttons and a joystick. The right side is themed for 'Kobalt Fighter', displaying a fighting game with a martial artist on the marquee and fiery graphics on the lower panel. Both cabinets have CRT-style screens, coin slots, and a variety of control buttons and joysticks for two players each. The cabinet is constructed from a combination of wood, metal, and plastic, with vibrant printed artwork and a sturdy, boxy form. The overall appearance is typical of classic arcade machines found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A dual arcade game cabinet with two side-by-side game setups, each featuring colorful artwork, CRT screens, and multiple control buttons and joysticks. The left side is themed for 'Bomb Camper' and the right for 'Kobalt Fighter', both with distinctive marquee art and coin slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing both game screens, control panels, coin slots, and detailed marquee artwork for 'Bomb Camper' and 'Kobalt Fighter'.
description_view_1: Side profile view showing the narrow depth of the cabinet and the edge of the side panel graphics.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying both game setups and their respective artwork and controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again highlighting the slim profile and edge details of the cabinet.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size, visible bezels around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout, each with a joystick and multiple colored buttons, arranged in rows with clear player labeling and color-coded sections.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; left side features 'Bomb Camper' with retro graphics and colored stripes, right side features 'Kobalt Fighter' with a martial artist and fiery background, both with bold game titles.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display partial extensions of the front artwork, including colored stripes and thematic graphics matching the respective games.
